### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " ## MiniQueue: Local Job Queue & Scheduler\r\n \r\n **MiniQueue** is a local, production-style job queue and scheduler (a \\\"mini Celery\\\") built to\r\n stress‑test AI coding agents on reliable concurrent system design.\r\n \r\n ### Features\r\n \r\n - **Services**: FastAPI API service, async worker service, scheduler service, plus a Typer CLI.\r\n - **Broker**: Redis Streams with consumer groups and visibility‑timeout style reclaim.\r\n - **Persistence**: SQLite via SQLAlchemy (async) for durable job metadata and job event logs.\r\n - **Observability**: Structured JSON logs and Prometheus metrics across all services.\r\n - **Reliability**: At‑least‑once delivery, retry with exponential backoff + jitter, DLQ, and\r\n   cooperative cancellation for multi‑step tasks.\r\n \r\n ### Quickstart\r\n \r\n ```bash\r\n # From the project root\r\n pip install -e \".[dev]\"\r\n \r\n # Run tests\r\n make test\r\n \r\n # Lint & type-check\r\n make lint\r\n \r\n # Start Redis + API + worker + scheduler\r\n make up\r\n \r\n # Tear everything down\r\n make down\r\n \r\n # Submit load test via CLI\r\n make loadtest\r\n ```\r\n \r\n ### Architecture (High Level)\r\n \r\n - **API service** (`miniqueue.api_app`):\r\n   - FastAPI app exposing JSON endpoints to submit jobs, query status, cancel, retry, and list jobs.\r\n   - Exposes `/metrics` for Prometheus and `/healthz` for liveness/DB/broker checks.\r\n - **Worker service** (`miniqueue.worker`):\r\n   - Async worker loops consuming from Redis Streams consumer group.\r\n   - Executes registered job types, records state transitions in SQLite, and only acknowledges\r\n     stream entries after durable persistence.\r\n - **Scheduler service** (`miniqueue.scheduler`):\r\n   - Periodically enqueues delayed jobs (`run_at` / `next_run_at`) and handles retries.\r\n   - Loads recurring schedules from `config/schedules.yml` and deduplicates ticks via a\r\n     `schedule_ticks` table.\r\n - **CLI** (`miniqueue.cli`):\r\n   - Typer-based CLI for job submission/inspection, tailing events, and running local load tests.\r\n \r\n A detailed description of failure scenarios, design tradeoffs, assumptions, and how to add new\r\n tasks is provided after the core implementation is complete.\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "82c91542927961fa89303bb4b4ee7583c7016bf69b38f8bea54d628630f6ac8c",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " schedules:\r\n   - id: pipeline_demo_every_minute\r\n     job_type: pipeline_demo\r\n     queue: default\r\n     interval_seconds: 60\r\n     max_attempts: 3\r\n     payload:\r\n       url: \"https://example.com\"\r\n       steps: 3\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "292861e412d16ae09370460efbe0d975227199cfc62add17edb457185aed1390",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " .PHONY: test lint up down loadtest\r\n \r\n PYTHON ?= python\r\n PIP ?= pip\r\n \r\n test:\r\n \t@docker compose up -d redis\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m pytest\r\n \r\n lint:\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m ruff check src tests\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m mypy src\r\n \r\n up:\r\n \t@docker compose up -d --build\r\n \r\n down:\r\n \t@docker compose down -v\r\n \r\n loadtest:\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m miniqueue.cli loadtest\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "2e51e535e8a180496039a5599482833854c45d8cecdec4492bfe484e96f1360a",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n __all__ = [\"__version__\"]\r\n \r\n __version__ = \"0.1.0\"\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "f16a3b4506abd2287b7c2c0271e258fffdab24ccf5e4f7bb749a3ec751c69bd9",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

**Services**: FastAPI API service, async worker service, scheduler service, plus a Typer CLI.\r\n - **Broker**: Redis Streams with consumer groups and visibility‑timeout style reclaim.\r\n - **Persistence**: SQLite via SQLAlchemy (async) for durable job metadata and job event logs.\r\n - **Observability**: Structured JSON logs and Prometheus metrics across all services.\r\n - **Reliability**: At‑least‑once delivery, retry with exponential backoff + jitter, DLQ, and\r\n   cooperative cancellation for multi‑step tasks.\r\n \r\n ### Quickstart\r\n \r\n ```bash\r\n # From the project root\r\n pip install -e \".[dev]\"\r\n \r\n # Run tests\r\n make test\r\n \r\n # Lint & type-check\r\n make lint\r\n \r\n # Start Redis + API + worker + scheduler\r\n make up\r\n \r\n # Tear everything down\r\n make down\r\n \r\n # Submit load test via CLI\r\n make loadtest\r\n ```\r\n \r\n ### Architecture (High Level)\r\n \r\n - **API service** (`miniqueue.api_app`):\r\n   - FastAPI app exposing JSON endpoints to submit jobs, query status, cancel, retry, and list jobs.\r\n   - Exposes `/metrics` for Prometheus and `/healthz` for liveness/DB/broker checks.\r\n - **Worker service** (`miniqueue.worker`):\r\n   - Async worker loops consuming from Redis Streams consumer group.\r\n   - Executes registered job types, records state transitions in SQLite, and only acknowledges\r\n     stream entries after durable persistence.\r\n - **Scheduler service** (`miniqueue.scheduler`):\r\n   - Periodically enqueues delayed jobs (`run_at` / `next_run_at`) and handles retries.\r\n   - Loads recurring schedules from `config/schedules.yml` and deduplicates ticks via a\r\n     `schedule_ticks` table.\r\n - **CLI** (`miniqueue.cli`):\r\n   - Typer-based CLI for job submission/inspection, tailing events, and running local load tests.\r\n \r\n A detailed description of failure scenarios, design tradeoffs, assumptions, and how to add new\r\n tasks is provided after the core implementation is complete.\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "82c91542927961fa89303bb4b4ee7583c7016bf69b38f8bea54d628630f6ac8c", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": {"1:LEN": "."}, "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " schedules:\r\n   - id: pipeline_demo_every_minute\r\n     job_type: pipeline_demo\r\n     queue: default\r\n     interval_seconds: 60\r\n     max_attempts: 3\r\n     payload:\r\n       url: \"https://example.com\"\r\n       steps: 3\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "292861e412d16ae09370460efbe0d975227199cfc62add17edb457185aed1390", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " .PHONY: test lint up down loadtest\r\n \r\n PYTHON ?= python\r\n PIP ?= pip\r\n \r\n test:\r\n \t@docker compose up -d redis\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m pytest\r\n \r\n lint:\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m ruff check src tests\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m mypy src\r\n \r\n up:\r\n \t@docker compose up -d --build\r\n \r\n down:\r\n \t@docker compose down -v\r\n \r\n loadtest:\r\n \t@$(PYTHON) -m miniqueue.cli loadtest\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "2e51e535e8a180496039a5599482833854c45d8cecdec4492bfe484e96f1360a", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": {"1:LEN": "."}, "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n __all__ = [\"__version__\"]\r\n \r\n __version__ = \"0.1.0\"\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "f16a3b4506abd2287b7c2c0271e258fffdab24ccf5e4f7bb749a3ec751c69bd9", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
